overview: BLOOM is a K-pop fan entertainment hub for ILLIT, BTS, Cortis, and LE SSERAFIM. Each group has its own beautifully themed section with streaming charts, fun games, and member facts — making it the ultimate fan destination.
features: 4 dedicated group sections (ILLIT, BTS, Cortis, LE SSERAFIM)
Streaming charts with bar, line, and pie chart visualizations
Heardle-style song guessing game with 6 attempts
K-pop trivia quiz with 30+ questions per group
Photo guess game — identify members from blurred photos
Member profile cards with bios and fun facts
20+ fun facts per group with favoriting
Responsive, animated design with dark mode
